overview: Dr. Troxell specializes in bioidentical hormone replacement therapy and anti-aging medicine. Services include hormone therapy, testosterone treatment, aesthetic procedures, and comprehensive wellness solutions.
highlights: Bioidentical hormone replacement and testosterone therapy
Aesthetic treatments (laser therapy, hair removal, skin tightening, spider vein treatment)
targetAudience: Individuals seeking hormone replacement therapy and anti-aging treatments for age-related health and aesthetic concerns.
